airtable.label: Airtable
airtable.keyHint: airtable.com/create/tokens → Create new token → name it, pick scopes, add your bases → copy the token (shown once)

brave-search.label: Brave Search
brave-search.keyHint: api-dashboard.search.brave.com → sign up (email verification + credit card required) → subscribe to a plan (no free plan for new signups since ~Feb 2026; all pl

cloudflare.label: Cloudflare
cloudflare.keyHint: Cloudflare dashboard → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token (copy it immediately — it is shown only once)

digitalocean.label: DigitalOcean
digitalocean.keyHint: Control Panel → Account → API → Tokens → Generate New Token

elevenlabs.label: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.keyHint: ElevenLabs dashboard → Developers (left sidebar) → API Keys → Create API Key (shown once — copy it immediately)

firecrawl.label: Firecrawl
firecrawl.keyHint: Log in at firecrawl.dev → Dashboard → API Keys → create/copy key (starts with fc-)

github.label: GitHub
github.keyHint: GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token

groq.label: Groq
groq.keyHint: GroqCloud Console → API Keys (console.groq.com/keys) → Create API Key

hubspot.label: HubSpot
hubspot.keyHint: HubSpot portal → Settings (gear) → Integrations → Private Apps (newer portals: Development → Legacy apps) → Create app → Auth tab → Show token

linear.label: Linear
linear.keyHint: Linear → Settings → Security & access → Personal API keys → New API key

mistral.label: Mistral
mistral.keyHint: console.mistral.ai (Studio) → API Keys in the left sidebar → Create new key

netlify.label: Netlify
netlify.keyHint: Netlify app → avatar → User settings → Applications → Personal access tokens → New access token

notion.label: Notion
notion.keyHint: Notion → Developer portal → Personal access tokens → + New token (copy the ntn_… token; shown only once)

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.keyHint: platform.openai.com → log in → Settings → API keys → "Create new secret key" (copy the sk-... key immediately; it is shown once)

openweathermap.label: OpenWeatherMap
openweathermap.keyHint: Sign in at openweathermap.org → My API keys (home.openweathermap.org/api_keys) → copy or generate a key

perplexity.label: Perplexity
perplexity.keyHint: Sign in at console.perplexity.ai, create an API group if you don't have one, then open API Keys and click Create key (copy it immediately — it's shown only once

replicate.label: Replicate
replicate.keyHint: Sign in at replicate.com → Account → API tokens → Create token

resend.label: Resend
resend.keyHint: Resend dashboard → API Keys → Create API Key (key starts with "re_", shown only once)

sendgrid.label: SendGrid
sendgrid.keyHint: SendGrid dashboard → Settings → API Keys → Create API Key (shown once, copy it immediately)

serper.label: Serper
serper.keyHint: Sign up at serper.dev (2,500 free queries), then Dashboard → API Keys

stripe.label: Stripe
stripe.keyHint: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys → reveal or create a Secret key (sk_live_... / sk_test_...)

todoist.label: Todoist
todoist.keyHint: Todoist → Settings → Integrations → Developer tab → copy your API token

vercel.label: Vercel
vercel.keyHint: Vercel dashboard → Account Settings → Tokens → Create (pick a scope and expiry, copy the token immediately — it's shown once)
